sources.issuing_organisation: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
sources.clinical_setting: Hospital, community, and long-term stroke rehabilitation and review.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for adult stroke rehabilitation assessment and longer-term review; not an exact source for isolated TIA follow-up and not directly validated for UAE services.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.14 — stroke assessment and rehabilitation plan
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports cognition, vision, hearing, swallowing, movement, continence, communication, nutrition, strength, sensation, balance, mood and mental health, pain, activity, participation, environment, medicines, allergies, goals, discharge information, and documented follow-up planning.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.1.17, 1.4.3, and 1.17.1–1.17.5 — transfer and long-term review
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports post-transfer follow-up, information needs, daily activities, participation goals, work, driving and transport discussion, and review of health and social care needs at 6 months and annually.
